Operation 'subscribeMod' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is minimal and lacks important context. It doesn't explain the side effects (mod added to subscriptions, notifications enabled), authentication requirements, or what the response contains. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full impact and when to use it.

data.current_description: Subscribe the authenticated user to a mod.
data.description_suggestion: Subscribe the authenticated user to a mod. This operation adds the mod to the user's subscriptions, enabling notifications and tracking of mod updates. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication. Returns a 201 status with the subscription confirmation.
data.reasoning: The current description is minimal and lacks important context. It doesn't explain the side effects (mod added to subscriptions, notifications enabled), authentication requirements, or what the response contains. Added these details to help AI agents understand the operation's full impact and when to use it.

message: Operation 'unsubscribeMod' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Similar to subscribeMod, the description lacks side effect information and response details. Added clarification about what happens when unsubscribing (removal from subscriptions, notification disabling) and expected response status to improve AI agent understanding.

data.current_description: Unsubscribe the authenticated user from a mod.
data.description_suggestion: Unsubscribe the authenticated user from a mod. This operation removes the mod from the user's subscriptions and disables related notifications. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication. Returns a 204 status on successful removal.
data.reasoning: Similar to subscribeMod, the description lacks side effect information and response details. Added clarification about what happens when unsubscribing (removal from subscriptions, notification disabling) and expected response status to improve AI agent understanding.

message: Operation 'getUserSubscriptions' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_input_details. The description doesn't mention pagination, which is important for API clients. It also doesn't clarify what the 2 parameters are (likely pagination/filtering parameters). Added information about pagination support and authentication requirements for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Retrieve all mods the authenticated user is subscribed to.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all mods the authenticated user is subscribed to. Returns a paginated list of mod objects. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication.
data.reasoning: The description doesn't mention pagination, which is important for API clients. It also doesn't clarify what the 2 parameters are (likely pagination/filtering parameters). Added information about pagination support and authentication requirements for better AI agent guidance.

data.current_description: Retrieve all mods created by the authenticated user.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve all mods created by the authenticated user. Returns a paginated list of mod objects. Supports filtering and sorting via query parameters. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication.
data.reasoning: Similar to getUserSubscriptions, this description lacks pagination context and parameter clarification. The 2 parameters likely support pagination and filtering. Added these details to help AI agents understand the response structure and available query options.

message: Operation 'addModRating' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too vague and lacks critical details. It doesn't specify what input is expected (rating value, mod identifier), whether it creates or updates, what the response contains, or authentication requirements. data.current_description: Submit a rating for a mod.
data.description_suggestion: Submit a rating for a mod. Accepts a rating value (typically 1-5) for a specified mod. Creates or updates the authenticated user's rating for that mod. Requires OAuth 2.0 authentication. Returns the created or updated rating object with 201 status.
data.reasoning: The current description is too vague and lacks critical details. It doesn't specify what input is expected (rating value, mod identifier), whether it creates or updates, what the response contains, or authentication requirements. Added comprehensive details about inputs, side effects (create vs update), and response format for improved AI agent interpretability.

message: Operation 'steamAuth' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity on input requirements (what is the encrypted app ticket and how to provide it), output format (AccessTokenObject), and side effects (user creation/update). Enhanced description specifies input parameters, return type, and state changes for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Request an access token on behalf of a Steam user using an encrypted app ticket.
data.description_suggestion: Request an OAuth 2.0 access token on behalf of a Steam user by providing an encrypted app ticket. Requires the Steam app ticket as input. Returns an AccessTokenObject containing the access token for subsequent authenticated requests. Successfully authenticated users are created or updated in the mod.io system.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on input requirements (what is the encrypted app ticket and how to provide it), output format (AccessTokenObject), and side effects (user creation/update). Enhanced description specifies input parameters, return type, and state changes for better AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Request an access token on behalf of an Xbox Live user.
data.description_suggestion: Request an OAuth 2.0 access token on behalf of an Xbox Live user by providing Xbox Live credentials or token. Requires Xbox Live authentication credentials as input. Returns an AccessTokenObject containing the access token for subsequent authenticated requests. Successfully authenticated users are created or updated in the mod.io system.
